prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 18 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~10 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 97.3 kg; Height 174.4 cm; BMI 32.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/81 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.4%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 7.6%; 3 months ago 7.1%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 206mg/dL; 9 months ago 221mg/dL; 6 months ago 183mg/dL; 3 months ago 159mg/dL; current 106mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 97.8kg; 9 months ago 97.7kg; 6 months ago 94.8kg; 3 months ago 94.7kg; current 97.3kg), Height (12 months ago 174.4cm; 9 months ago 174.4cm; 6 months ago 174.4cm; 3 months ago 174.4cm; current 174.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 32.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 81mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 81mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 29U/L; 6 months ago 20U/L; 3 months ago 27U/L; current 26U/L), AST (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 31U/L; current 29U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; current 35mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 319mg/g; 9 months ago 314mg/g; 6 months ago 212mg/g; 3 months ago 258mg/g; current 250mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 87mg/dL; 6 months ago 90mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 88mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 38mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 89mg/dL; 3 months ago 107mg/dL; current 101mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 11.1g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
